text: The Aerospace Division module orchestrates autonomous drone navigation, MavLink autopilot integration, A* pathfinding, and finite state machine (FSM) telemetry synchronization.
The Note Board is a real-time UI dashboard visualizer that updates modular metrics, system state, and captures user telemetry directly through the Sync Layer.

The Sync Layer operates as a unified event bus. It features a background daemon-thread listener running patterns on 'oasis:channel:*', automatically falling back to SQLite database queue polling when Redis is offline.
JARVIS AI is the central planning and vector RAG memory layer of the ecosystem. It queries Qdrant database collections or runs semantic local cosine similarity searches using mock embeddings.
The Engineering Core module manages physical hydraulics simulations, Simulink models, and telemetry streaming of hydraulic pressure and flow rates.
OASIS PRIME is the core roguelite game engine built with Unity ECS architecture, registering players, enemy movement, looting, and bridge synchronization.
